title: Oil crashes further: Brent toward $88/bbl on deal optimism
snippet: Oil prices crashed further with Brent crude heading toward $88/bbl, a drop of approximately 4% on Friday and the lowest level in nearly 2 months, driven by deal optimism. Analysts project Brent could fall to approximately $70 if Hormuz fully reopens, per Fitch. Current trading range is $88-$108 amid conflicting forces of deal optimism and ongoing conflict uncertainty.
tag_reason: Continued oil price decline from previous day; new Fitch forecast of $70 floor if Hormuz reopens; $88 lowest in ~2 months; quantifies market impact of deal optimism
